summary: server-parket@3.8.1: child_process + shell exec patterns require human review
details: index.js imports child_process and contains execSync calls invoking bash and zsh shells (around lines 301 and 317). The surrounding context, command sources, and reachability at install/import time were not conclusively determined. Without confirmation of attacker-controlled destinations, credential reads, or install-time auto-execution, the pattern alone is insufficient to classify as an active attack but is suspicious enough to warrant manual review of the shell-exec call sites and any data they handle.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
